@graph.name: Transfer Pricing in Meghalaya | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Transfer Pricing in Meghalaya. From ₹75,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Transfer pricing study, documentation, benchmarking, TP audi. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: When is transfer pricing documentation required?

acceptedAnswer.text: When aggregate value of international transactions exceeds ₹1 crore, or specified domestic transactions exceed ₹20 crore.
Chartered accountant's report certifying arm's length nature of international and domestic related party transactions. Due by 31st October.
Yes. We handle TPO proceedings, DRP references, and ITAT appeals for transfer pricing disputes.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide transfer pricing services in Meghalaya?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Meghalaya from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Meghalaya?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Meghalaya fall under ROC Shillong. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Meghalaya-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Meghalaya?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Meghalaya: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
